title: Moderation update: spam & harassment actions
body: We processed recent high-severity abuse reports. Two accounts were permanently banned: spam_wave_42 for high-volume phishing spam across multiple channels, and toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment of community members. Reports against a core_maintainer were reviewed and found to be a false-positive mass report; no action was taken on that account. As always, thank you to everyone who reports abuse—this helps keep the community safe.
